member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.BaseLanguageFallbackHierarchyDataSource
member.summary: Base class for language fallback hierarchy data source implementation.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.BaseLanguageFallbackHierarchyDataSource.Refresh(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the dependencies between the languages and their fallback languages.
member.param: The targeted database which used to read all the languages items under '/sitecore/system/Languages'

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Configurations.EdgeConnectorSettings.ExcludeSitecoreMediaUrlPrefix
member.summary: Indicate if media url prefix is required to be added or not.

member.summary: Number of items acknowledged by edge

member.summary: Checks for duplicate and also registers the item in the duplicate cache. Also returns the item delete status since it is pssible we see items that are update and delete

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.DirectPublishing.IItemDeDuper.DeDupItems(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo})
member.summary: De dups items in a collection and turns any items that are known deletes into deleted items

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.DirectPublishing.IItemDeDuper.RegisterDeletedItem(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo)
member.summary: Tell the de-dup service that an item is a delete. This will allow updates to be converted to delete further down the pipeline

member.summary: compare the publishing item with the edge to verify changes
member.param: The to be compared with the edge
member.returns: The result of the comparison with the edge

member.summary: Checks edge to see if items should be republished

The language (culture) to check

member.summary: This is the func for the transform. It should be declared as "Execute". When we switch to C#8, this can be replaced with a default implementation

member.summary: Interface for creating TPL blocks as injectable objects instead of methods on a pipline class.

member.summary: This is the func for the transform. It should be declared as "Execute". When we switch to C#8, this can be replaced with a default implementation

member.summary: Executes the TPL block

member.summary: Interface for creating an Async block

member.returns: The site info of the item

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.MaxExportEntitiesThreadCount
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of concurrent threads to export delivery entities.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.ExportEntitiesBufferSize
member.summary: Gets the buffer size of export entities.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.ExportPublishEventsBatchSize
member.summary: Gets the batch size of export entities publish events.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.LayoutServiceConfigName
member.summary: Get the name of the layout service configuration

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.GraphQLEndpointUrl
member.summary: Gets the url for GraphQL endpoint.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.DeliveryTransientFailureRetryCount
member.summary: The retry count for occurring transient error when communicating with delivery endpoint

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.DeliveryTransientFailureSleepTime
member.summary: The time to wait before each retry when transient error occurs when communicating with delivery endpoint

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.DeliveryCircuitBreakerAttemptsBeforeBreak
member.summary: The maximum number of errors which change state of the circuit breaker to Opened.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.DeliveryCircuitBreakerDurationOfBreak
member.summary: The time to wait before trying to communicate with delivery endpoint after the circuit breaker change its state to Opened.

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.MaxPublishThreadCount
member.summary: Maximum number of publish/signal threads

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.MaxMetadataCacheSize
member.summary: Maximum number of metadata entries cached during the publish

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.CheckDeltaStatusBatchSize
member.summary: Number of items delta check requests sent to Edge at one time

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.AckCleanupTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Number of seconds to wait for the Ack monitor to complete. The default is 25

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.AckWaitTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Number of seconds to wait for an Ack message before giving up. The default is 600 (10 minutes).

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.DisableDatabaseCaches
member.summary: Indicates the database cache is disabled during publishing

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IContentHubSettings.MaxDependencyResolutionThreadCount
member.summary: Number of threads used to resolve item dependencies.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.GenerateAssociatedDeliveryEntitiesAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.EntityPublishInfo,Sitecore.Data.Items.Item)
member.summary: Generates one or more Delivery entity(s) per published Sitecore item. These are special purpose entities like Templates, Layouts, Fields, etc. The Identifier for each generated entity must be unique across all entities, including the primary entity
member.param: Provides information about the published Sitecore item.
The primary entit that will be sent to edge
Reference to the Sitecore item that has been published. If null, means the item has been deleted from database.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.GeneratePrimaryDeliveryEntityAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo,Sitecore.Data.Items.Item)
member.summary: Generates the primary entity that is sent to Edge. This is the entity that is returned when GraphQL queries for an Item
member.param: Item publish info the entity being generated
The sitecore item

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.GeneratePrimaryEntityId(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo)
member.summary: Returns the primary entity identifier used by edge

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.CreateItemInfo(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.FieldFallback.Status,System.Guid,Sitecore.Data.Items.Item)
member.summary: Returns a the ItemInfo used by the publish pipeline to determine how to process the entity. This can be an ItemInfo, or a custom ItemInfo that inhertis from ItemInfo

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.CanGenerateEntityForItem(Sitecore.Data.Items.Item)
member.summary: Returns true if the generator can generate entities for the item sent to the generator

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.EntityGenerator.IDeliveryEntityGenerator.GeneratorSearchOrder
member.summary: Returns the order generators are checked to see if they can handle an item. This allows custom generators a chance to override the default processing for specific items. Higher values are searched first

member.summary: Get ancestor languages from current to root language
member.param: The current language to start from
The root language to stop at
The targeted database
